latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori CLI runtime infrastructure is now separated into executor, active-goal args, active-goal store, active-goal lock, and a compatibility runtime barrel. runner.ts consumes lock/store directly, while command modules can continue importing the runtime barrel during migration. The split keeps objective .opennori state loading, dossier writes, stale-evidence pruning, citty command execution, and single-writer locking in deterministic code, without adding subjective AC or architecture-quality validators.
